app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: Wan AI-second, searchable library blong accessibility findings blong kwiktaem kopim insaed manual reports
about.what_body: Dit is 'n biblioteek van toeganklikheidsbevindings vir handmatige oudits. Soek vir wat jy waargeneem het, vind 'n beskrywing wat pas, en kopieer dit in jou verslag.
about.what_body_2: Consistency is doubleplusgood, especially in this field. Search this goodthink library of WCAG-aligned findingwrite, pick one matching your observation, customize it, and pastewise it into your audit report.
about.what_wcag: Hierdie data dek WCAG 2.2 Vlak A en AA, die standaard wat deur die meeste organisasies gebruik word en die grondslag vir baie wetlike toeganklikheidsvereistes. 'n Klein aantal Vlak AAA-sukseskriteriums is ook ingesluit waar die toeganklikheidsgemeenskap die mislukkingspatroon breedweg as beduidend beskou.
about.step_1_body: Type what you observed — a component, element type, or plain-speak description.
about.step_2_body: Use the Priority Up/Down arrows on each result to tune ranking. Starmark to show first. Unshow to hide.
about.step_3_body: Select the finding that best matches. Results are ranked by goodthink relevance.
about.step_4_body: Add a location prefix (e.g. "Global:") or use AI to help revise the wording.
about.step_5_body: Copywrite the description and suggested fix steps into your spreadsheet or report.
about.feature_ai_body: Gebruik AI om 'n bevinding te herskryf gebaseer op jou notas. Bring jou eie API-sleutel van Anthropic, OpenAI, of Google. Dit bly in jou blaaier en word nooit na ons gestuur nie. Stel dit op in
about.feature_languages_body: Hierdie biblioteek is beskikbaar in meer as 50 tale, insluitend RTL-ondersteuning vir regs-na-links-tale. Ek het 'n liefde en fassinasie vir taal, kultuur, en taalkunde. Om al hierdie tale by te voeg was 'n sytog, deel-eksperiment, deel-konyngat, deel-om die plot vir 'n bietjie te verloor. Die vertalings is deur AI gegenereer, so hou dit asseblief in gedagte met betrekking tot vertaalfoute. Regstellings welkom. Skakel in
about.feature_party_body: It's in Settingsmin. Under Appearance. You'll know it when you see it.
about.feature_a11y_body: WCAG 2.2 hoté féik. Focus management, live regions, full keyboard navigation, reduced motion support, hoté high-contrast color tokens ek féik.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain-speak, near-duplicates consolidated, each aligned to a WCAG criterion. Sources consulted:
about.coming_auth: Optional sign-in with Google or GitHub to sync your settings across devices.
about.coming_custom: Add and edit your own custom findings, stored privately.
about.coming_ai: Additional AI providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, and more.
search.label: Diskribaem wanem yu observem
search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button no label
search.hint_live: Results i kamaot taem yu taepim.
search.hint_submit: Type a description and press Findsay or Enter.
search.hint_voting: Priorityrate results — starmarked results always appear first.
search.view_all_confirm_body: Cái nầy slà hiện {count} kết quả trên trang đơn nầy.
search.hint_change_in: Olgeta opsons ia i save jenjem insaed
results.vote_hint: Priorityrate results up or down — starmarked results appear first. Unshow to hide. (Can be undone).
results.no_results_announce: No results for "{query}". Try a component, element type, or a different plain-speak.
results.no_results_body: Thử tên thành phần (vd. "button"), loại phần tử (vd. "input"), hoặc cụm từ khác.
detail.location_placeholder: e.g. Global: / Kart: / Prodakt ditaels pejez:
detail.refine_hint_ai: Describe what to change and AI thinkbox will rewrite. Change your AI model or turn this off in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Use this space for notes. Enable AI Thinkbox in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: and it will rewrite based on your notes.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: e.g. this is specific to mobile, element is a tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Example: "Doubleplusungood findings like this are found throughout the Onboarding Flow. Lower priority issues may follow."
detail.rewrite_aria: Save note and revise selected fields with AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: This field is empty. There is nothing to copywrite.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Yu hav meid signifikant chenjes tu dis tekst. Reseting wil remov ol ov yor edits.
detail.copy_all_aria: Kopi deskripshon and sajested fiks tugeder

detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Reset deskripshon and sajested fiks tu orijinal valjuz
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: Finding Details and Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching speechwise or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other speechwise will be AI-translated — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other speechwise will be re-translated from the updated Oldspeak on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other speechwise will show AI-translated text.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the Oldspeak version. Make any edits and save, or skip.
detail.revise_error_body: Something went plusungood. Press Save & Revise Selected to try again.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}). Double-check your key in Settingsmin.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a moment and try again.
detail.revise_error_network_error: No internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
settings.heading: Settingsmin
settings.language_desc: Use the dropdown and Change button to select a new speechwise. The change won't be saved until you press Save.
settings.language_changed_announce: Language: Updated, Save button press koro confirm korte
settings.voting_on: Sort Priority controls are visible on each result.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Tumar AI Instructions onujayi Descriptions hoté/ba Suggested Fix badláibo.
settings.privacy_body_1: Karon, ang tanan gitipigan sa lokal sa imong browser gamit ang localStorage. Wala'y ipadala kanamo o sa bisan unsang server. Ang gitipigan nga datos naglakip sa: tema, lengguwahe, platform filter, setting sa Live Search, kagustuhan sa AI provider, API keys, rankings, mga bitoon, mga archived nga butang, mga pinned nga butang, bag-ong mga nakit-an, kustom nga mga nakit-an, personal nga pag-edit sa corpus, ug ang imong katapusan nga giablihan nga nakit-an.
settings.privacy_body_2: Ang mga API key gitipigan sa imong browser lamang ug direkta ipadala sa AI provider nga imong gi-configure. Wala kami makakita o makadawat niini. Mahimo nimong tanggalon kini bisan kanus-a gikan sa mga setting sa AI sa ubos, o pinaagi sa pagpanas sa datos sa site sa imong browser alang niini nga pahina.
settings.privacy_body_translations: Ang mga paghubad sa UI ug ang base nga pampublikong corpus gihubad gamit ang AI ug mahimong adunay mga sayop. Walay datos nga gisulod sa tiggamit, kustom nga mga nakit-an, o personal nga pag-edit ang ipadala para hubaron.
settings.api_key_error: Doubleplusungood: API key is required when AI Thinkbox is enabled.
settings.reset_all: I-reset ang mga Setting & Limpyohi ang Datos
settings.confirm_reset_all_heading: I-reset ang mga Setting ug Limpyohi ang Datos
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: This will clear all saved settings — including your API keys. This cannot be undone.
settings.reset_all_announce: Tanan nga mga Setting Na-reset ug Nalimpyohan ang Datos.
settings.unsaved_body: Tumar kichú changes nó séb. Tumi ki korte sáo?
settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion on ase. Confetti kobi animation skip hoibo. Fér on korte, OS accessibility settings-e reduced motion off koro.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Filter findings by the WCAG version and conformance level you are auditing to.

footer.credit: Usa ka proyekto ni Mikey Ilagan
party.announce_full: Joycamp mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have changed to a doubleplusgood bright palette. Colorful confetti is now falling. The mouse cursor is now a magic wand.
party.announce_reduced: Joycamp mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. Colors have changed. Confetti was skipped — we acknowledge your reduced motion setting.
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Risivim ads long kompani long accessibility mo developer komuniti. Praevesi blong yu i respected, nogat tracking, nogat profiles, nogat algorithms.
onboarding.heading: Welkam long A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Yu no kasem end blong tour yet. Klosim nao mo skipim rest?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Diskribaem wanem yu observem: nem blong wan component, symptom, o WCAG success criterion. Yusum Platform mo WCAG Level filters blong neroim corpus. Yusum Narrow Results blong filtarem insaed wanem i soem finis. Results i sorted long relevance, nao long severity.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Yusum Rank Up/Down blong rankem results long importance. Starem wan finding blong soem hem fastaem oltaem. Pinem wan finding blong kipim hem long top long olgeta searches.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Openem wan finding blong lukim title, WCAG criterion, description, mo suggested fix. Adem wan location prefix long description (e.g. "Global:"). Yusum AI Assist blong revaesem eni field yusum notes blong yu, nao kopim fields wan wan o yusum Copy All blong grabim everitin wantem.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app coverage i mo limited long web.
search.hint_ranking: Yusum Rank Up/Down blong adjustim hao results i sort. Starem wan result blong soem hem fastaem oltaem.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Yusum +term blong requirem wan wod mo -term blong excludim hem (e.g.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Klearem narrow filter mo ritonem long full search
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 result i pinned mo i soem oltaem.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} results i pinned mo i soem oltaem.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 cái đươc đánh dấu sao slà ké hiện lên trên cùng mọi lúc.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} cái đươc đánh dấu sao slà ké hiện lên trên cùng mọi lúc.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 cái đươc lưu trữ slà ké hiện ở cuối danh sách kết quả mọi lúc.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} cái đươc lưu trữ slà ké hiện ở cuối danh sách kết quả mọi lúc.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Cái nầy slà hiện 1 kết quả trên trang đơn nầy.
results.skip_to_next: Bỏ qua đến kết quả tiếp theo
results.sort_live_hint: Tìm kiếm trực tiếp đang bật. Kết quả slà sắp xếp ngay sau khi nhập hoặc thay đổi lựa chọn.
results.summary_query: Đang hiện kết quả cho "{query}", sắp theo "{sort}", thu hẹp theo "{narrow}", {platform}.
results.summary_no_narrow: Đang hiện kết quả cho "{query}", sắp theo "{sort}", {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Sắp xếp thông minh ưu tiên theo Mức độ nghiêm trọng trước, rồi theo điểm xếp hạng cá nhân của mày. Mục đánh dấu sao luôn hiện trên cùng; Mục lưu trữ luôn hiện dưới cùng. Đây là thứ tự sắp xếp mặc định.
results.sort_severity_desc: Mức độ nghiêm trọng: Cao đến Thực hành tốt nhất
results.sort_severity_asc: Mức độ nghiêm trọng: Thực hành tốt nhất đến Cao
results.sort_sc: SC thất bại (Thấp nhất đến Cao nhất)
results.sort_wcag_level_info: Tiêu chí AAA có hỗ trợ chọn lọc trong kho tài liệu nầy. Không phải tất cả tiêu chí thành công AAA đều được đại diện, và một số mục được đánh dấu AAA có thể phản ánh hướng dẫn thực hành tốt nhất hơn là mục tiêu tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt.
results.sort_platform: Nền tảng (Tất cả hoặc Cụ thể)
results.sort_popularity_info: Trong bản cập nhật tương lai, cái nầy slà phản ánh độ phổ biến toàn cầu tổng hợp dựa trên tương tác người dùng trên tất cả tài khoản. Hiện tại, độ phổ biến dựa trên phiên làm việc và đặt lại khi mày đóng ứng dụng.
results.rank_hint: Xếp hạng kết quả lên hoặc xuống để điều chỉnh cách sắp xếp. Đánh dấu sao để hiện trước. Lưu trữ để ẩn. (Có thể hoàn tác.)
results.pinned_in_search_heading: Được ghim trong tìm kiếm nầy
results.unpin_from_search: Kết quả nầy đang được ghim. Bỏ ghim để đưa vào kết quả tìm kiếm.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Opning a nu fainding wil diskard yor kolapsed panel and eni unsavd chenjes.
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Includ Sajested Fiks titel wen kopid
detail.ai_revision_hint: Kies wèlke velde jy wil hersien met die blokkies hierbo, voeg jou notas hier by, en AI sal daai velde herskryf. Om die AI-model te verander of dit af te skakel, gaan na
detail.finding_note_hint: Voeg konteks hier by: ligging, ernsgraad-notas, of enigiets projekspesifiek. Skakel AI Assist aan in
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: en dit sal herskryf gebaseer op jou notas.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: bv. dit is spesifiek vir mobiel, element is 'n tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: bv. Kritieke ernsgraad, gevind regdeur die Aanboordvloei. Laer-ernsgraad-kwessies kan opduik sodra hierdie opgelos is.
detail.ai_revision_aria: Stoor AI-instruksies en hersien gekose velde
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Iets het verkeerd geloop tydens hersiening. Druk Stoor & Hersien Gekose om weer te probeer.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Ongeldige of verstreke API-sleutel ({provider}). Kontroleer jou sleutel in Instellings.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Tempolimiet bereik ({provider}). Wag 'n oomblik en probeer weer.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Geen internetverbinding nie. Kontroleer jou verbinding en probeer weer.
help.take_tour_description: Herspeel die aanboord-rondleiding om te hersien hoe A11yFred werk.
help.step_1_body: Resultate verskyn terwyl jy tik. Gebruik die Platform-filter in Instellings om Web- of Inheemse App-bevindings te kies (die meeste is webgerig). Gebruik +term om 'n woord te vereis en -term om een uit te sluit (bv. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Elke resultaat het Rang Op- en Rang Af-knoppies om die rangorde te verander. Ster 'n resultaat om dit altyd eerste te laat verskyn. Vaspen enige resultaat om dit bo aan alle soektogte te hou.
help.step_3_body: Kies die bevinding wat die beste pas by wat jy waargeneem het. Resultate word eers gesorteer op relevansie, dan op ernsgraad.
help.step_4_body: Añadir un prefixo de lugar a la descripción (p.ej. 'Global:' o 'Cart:'). Si AI Assist está on, añadir tus notas al campo Revision Notes i AI reescribirá el hallazgo para que cuadre con tu contexto.
help.step_5_body: Kopieer die beskrywing en voorgestelde regstelling in jou sigblad of verslag. Gebruik Kopieer Alles om beide velde gelyktydig te gryp.
help.shortcuts_note: Kortpaaie is slegs aktief wanneer fokus op die resultatelys is. Gebruik hulle om vinnig te navigeer en bevindings te beoordeel sonder om die lys te verlaat.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Dieselfde kwessies kom op byna elke webwerf voor. Hierdie hulpmiddel hou jou beskrywings konsekwent oor verslae heen sodat jy nie elke keer van nuuts af skryf nie. Die biblioteek is gebou uit werklike ouditwerk, dan verfyn met AI vir duidelike taal, konsekwentheid, akkuraatheid, en feitekontrole teen
about.feature_agentic_body: As jy Claude (Anthropic) gebruik, kan jy ook Pas Bestaande Styl aktiveer. Die AI sal vorige hersieningsvoorbeelde deursoek om die toon en diepte wat jy reeds gevestig het te ewenaar, en nie net die huidige bevinding in isolasie herskryf nie.
about.examples_ath001_label: Button oo Link yaŋ dok label
about.examples_ath010_label: Control Label Munnaí Appearance Biyán, Purpose Nó
settings.party_confirm_body: Kichu ektu beshi ajib hoibo, hoitopare accessible nó hoibo.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Ei translation AI diyé banáno hoiché, native Rohingya speaker koré review kore nai.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya manush genocide hoté jabordosti migration-er shikkar hoiché. Ei translation sábadhane use koro, hoitopare correction deo jodi paro.
settings.platform_all_desc: Web, native apps, hoté documents-er shob results dékháo.
settings.starred_results_desc: Ang mga starred nga butang pirme motaas sa ibabaw, sa han-ay nga gipanbitoon.
settings.archived_results_desc: Ang mga archived nga butang pirme makita sa pinaka-ubos sa mga resulta.
settings.rankings_desc: Ang taas ug ubos nga ranking nga imong gihatag sa mga resulta. Kon mas taas ang ranking sa usa ka resulta kumpara sa uban, mas una kini makita sa pagpangita.
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_api_keys: Tanan nga API keys sa AI provider
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_frequenc: Datos sa frequency sa paggamit (mga bukas, mga kopya)
settings.confirm_reset_all_keep_item_cor: Imong personal nga mga entry ug pag-edit
